title: Fragrance Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:IMG 5936.gif|right|400px]]

==Summary==
'''Fragrance manipulation''' is an ability to manipulate the smell of oneself, others, or the surrounding area. The user being able to change the aroma by increasing, decreasing, or temporarily removing the smell given off. This can be used as a defense mechanism to scare off or temporarily distract attackers, and can heavily counter those who carry heighten senses
